note: Daily figures are estimates based on 4-day totals from OSINT reporting. Per-day breakdown unavailable; distribution assumed approximately equal. Update daily_log with confirmed announced figures as available.

daily_log.label: Op Epic Fury — Opening Salvo
daily_log.notes: Day 1 opening salvo. DXB Terminal 3 struck. Al Dhafra, Al Udeid, Ali Al Salem targeted. ~est. from 4-day totals.

daily_log.label: Civilian Infrastructure Enters Target Set
daily_log.notes: First residential building struck (Dubai). Shopping mall hit (Sharjah). Hotels targeted. ~est. from 4-day totals.

daily_log.label: Energy Infrastructure + Hormuz Closure
daily_log.notes: Ras Tanura (Saudi, 550k b/d) shut down. Mussafah ADNOC terminal struck. IRGC declared Hormuz closed. Hezbollah second front opened. ~est. from 4-day totals.

daily_log.label: Embassy Strike + Continued Salvos
daily_log.notes: US Embassy Riyadh directly struck. Fujairah oil facility fire. Duqm second fuel tank. 3 flights diverted from Dubai. ~est. from 4-day totals.

depletion.bloomberg_assessment: ~1 week to depletion at current rate (Bloomberg, Mar 2)
depletion.uae_official_position: Officially denies depletion concern; claims 'robust strategic stockpile'
depletion.impact_if_degraded: If intercept rate drops 95% → 80%: ~8-9 BM impacts/day in populated areas vs current ~2/day (~4x civilian casualty increase)
